thread.title: Alberta passenger rail master plan aims to connect Calgary, Edmonton communities

title: Alberta passenger rail master plan aims to connect Calgary, Edmonton communities
text:
Live Streaming 24/7
Alberta passenger rail master plan aims to connect Calgary, Edmonton communities
A passenger rail system could be rolling through the province soon, as Alberta continues to lay out its rail master plan.
35m ago

Clean up underway after an explosion in Calgary’s community of Mahogany
The clean-up began after an explosion destroyed a Calgary home in the SE community of Mahogany Thursday afternoon. Phoenix Phillips talks to witnesses who recalled hearing the explosion and are surprised only one townhome was destroyed.
26m ago
